prediction_function:
probabilities <- 1 / (1 + exp(-LP)) 
 result_matrix <- matrix(probabilities, ncol = 1) 
 colnames(result_matrix) <- 'probability' 
 result_matrix

metadata.model_name: AKI Model (log creatinine — evaluator pre-processing required)
metadata.description: AKI logistic regression using log-transformed creatinine. The variable log_creatinine_mean must be created by the evaluator before calling secure_model_validation() using: validation_data$log_creatinine_mean <- log(validation_data$creatinine_mean + 0.001)
